facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this. Basket boats on the Cửa Cạn River, no crowds, no resort price tag. Eco Tour Thái Dương puts you in a traditional coracle and lets the river do the rest. Mangroves on both sides. Local guides who actually know the waterway. 4.3 stars from 92 reviews and still under the radar. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Spinning through Cửa Cạn River in a basket boat, mangroves closing in on both sides. This is what Phu Quoc looks like off the resort strip. Eco Tour Thái Dương. 4.3 stars. Still quiet.

instagram.caption: Locals don't post about Cửa Cạn River. Basket boats, mangroves, zero crowds. Eco Tour Thái Dương. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Spinning a basket boat through Cửa Cạn River. No resort. No crowds. Just this.

tiktok.caption: River. Basket boat. Zero tourists. Eco Tour Thái Dương hits different. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #EcoTour #BasketBoat #PhuQuocTips
